findings.description: Nine small images extracted from the map all share the identical generic alt text 'Map symbol', which likely represent distinct elements (north arrow, scale bar, sample-location icon, property-boundary line, surface-water line, etc.). The descriptions do not differentiate among them.
findings.evidence: HTML contains nine tags in sequence, all with the same alt text, though the PDF map shows distinct legend icons for sample locations, property boundaries, surface water, compass rose, etc.
